t_ch: 哎，等等…这，这不对吧！这不是帕姆吗？！
t_en: Hey, wait... This, this isn't right! Isn't this Pom-Pom!?

t_ch: 噢，做得非常精致啊。
t_en: Oh wow, that's some really fine craftsmanship.

t_ch: 这是「合金帕姆王」的玩具模型，目前尚未正式投放市场销售。这不算什么，之后各位还会见到更酷炫的玩具呢。
t_en: This is a toy model of Alloy King Pom-Pom, which hasn't been officially released to the market yet. But just you wait, you'll see even cooler toys coming up later.

t_ch: 这东西的版权，真的没有问题吗？!
t_en: Are you sure there's no copyright issue with this thing!?

t_ch: 嗯…其实嘛，这是《苍天航路绒绒号》的帕姆，和星穹列车的帕姆无关。
t_en: Uh... actually, this is Pom-Pom from Fluffy Across the Blue, which is totally unrelated to the Pom-Pom from Astral Express.

t_ch: 那就还是有关系啊！
t_en: That still means they're related!

t_ch: 帕姆王和帕姆还是不一样的，跨作品比较的行为不可取啊。
t_en: King Pom-Pom and Pom-Pom are different characters. You really shouldn't be making cross-franchise comparisons!

t_ch: 版权还真是复杂啊…
t_en: Copyright stuff is really complicated, huh...

t_ch: 没错，世界上最复杂的事情之一，就是知识产权问题了。
t_en: You got that right. Intellectual property is one of the most complicated things in the world.

t_ch: 有全宇宙最强的法务团队服务呢，相信一切版权问题都不成问题——除非公司想让它成为问题。
t_en: With the best legal team in the universe at our service, I'm sure all copyright issues will be a breeze, unless the IPC wants them to be an issue.

t_ch: 为什么叫帕姆王？
t_en: Why is it called King Pom-Pom?

t_ch: 作为列车长，它也算是星穹列车的无冕之王了，对吧？总不能叫他王帕姆吧。
t_en: As the conductor, Pom-Pom is basically the uncrowned king of the Astral Express, I'd say? We can't exactly call them Pom-Pom Kong, can we?

t_ch: 唔，要说送给列车的纪念品，恐怕没什么能比这款玩具更合适的了！
t_en: Hmm, speaking of souvenirs for the Express, I bet nothing could be more perfect than this toy!

t_ch: 不过，单单送出个礼物，似乎缺了那么点意思。
t_en: But if it feels a bit one-sided if I'm the only one giving a gift here

t_ch: 我有个不情之请：我想请{NICKNAME}去那边的无头机铠雕像同我合个影，再为照片签个名，作为给珠星的员工们留下的纪念品，如何？
t_en: I have a small favor to ask: {NICKNAME}, would you mind taking a photo with me by that headless mechatron statue over there? And maybe signing the photo too? I'd love to leave it as a memento for the staff at Pearluxe Corp. How's that sound?

t_ch: 要是你愿意的话，我可以动用我手头的权限，把还未面世的「帕姆王-合金武装<unbreak>999</unbreak>」镀金开模原型送给各位——全宇宙仅此一台，考虑一下，{NICKNAME}亲！
t_en: If you're willing, I can pull a few strings and use my access privileges to give you all the gold-plated prototype of the yet-to-be-released "King Pom-Pom: Alloy Armor <unbreak>999</unbreak>," the only one in the entire universe. Just give it a thought, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 听上去倒是不亏！
t_en: Sounds like a sweet deal!

t_ch: 全宇宙仅此一件的纪念品，列车长一定喜欢！
t_en: A one-of-a-kind souvenir in the entire universe, our conductor will definitely love it!

t_ch: 不愧是P<unbreak>30</unbreak>啊！
t_en: As expected of a P<unbreak>30</unbreak> agent!

t_ch: 哪儿的话，星穹列车的英雄们驾临此处，若不送出点好东西，又怎么能配得上各位的身份。
t_en: It's nothing, really. When heroes from the Astral Express grace our humble establishment, how could we not offer something special? It would be unworthy of your status otherwise.

t_ch: 全靠你啦，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: It's all up to you, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 走吧走吧～
t_en: Come on, let's go~

t_ch: 一尊珠星机铠主题的合影雕塑。你可以来到雕塑背后，将自己伟大的脸摆放在合适的位置上…再调整好合适的相机视角，看上去就像你是机铠战士一样。
t_en: A Pearluxe-Corp-themed sculpture for taking group photos. You can go behind the sculpture and place your amazing face in an appropriate spot... Adjust the camera to a suitable angle, and you'll look like a mechatron warrior.

t_ch: 简直是人机一体，准备好拍照了吗？
t_en: Man and mechatron in perfect harmony! Ready to take a photo?

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 噫嘻嘻，好喜欢这张照片！突然生出私心，想要把它私藏起来了。
t_en: Hehehe, I love this one so much! I suddenly have this selfish urge to keep it all to myself.

t_ch: 但说好的独家礼物你可不能忘喔！
t_en: And don't forget about that exclusive gift you promised!

t_ch: 没问题，不仅如此，我还可以每人送一套普通版作为封口费！走，去收银区结账吧。
t_en: You bet! In fact, I'll throw in a normal edition for each one of you as hush money! Come on, let's head to checkout.

t_ch: 您好，很高兴为您服务。
t_en: How are you doing? It's my pleasure to serve you.

t_ch: 我想给这三位到访的星穹列车的贵客一人送出一套「合金帕姆王」模玩作为礼物。
t_en: I'd like to present each of our three distinguished guests from the Astral Express with an "Alloy King Pom-Pom" toy model as a gift.

t_ch: 好的，没问题。礼品记账的话，能麻烦您报一下工号吗？
t_en: Sure, you got it. For the gift expense record, could you please provide your employee ID?

t_ch: 相关消费请帮我记在这个工号名下。
t_en: Please charge these expenses to this employee ID.

t_ch: 诶，这是…真珠女士的工号？！
t_en: Huh, this is... Madam Pearl's ID number!?

t_ch: 真珠的工号？
t_en: Pearl's ID number?

t_ch: 毕竟，几位可是由真珠女士请来的贵客啊，礼物当然要以她的名义送出才够尊贵嘛。
t_en: After all, you are esteemed guests invited by Madam Pearl herself. It would only be fitting for the gifts to be presented in her name.

t_ch: 原来如此，请稍等。
t_en: I see, please wait a moment.

t_ch: 您的「合金帕姆王」打包好了，请问您是现在带走，还是使用寄送服务？
t_en: Your "Alloy King Pom-Pom" is all packed up. Would you like to take it with you, or shall we use our delivery service?

t_ch: 接下来我们还有参观流程，就麻烦你们直接寄送到星穹列车上吧。
t_en: Since we still have the tour to go through, please just have it delivered to the Astral Express.

t_ch: 没问题，也祝列车的几位贵客参观愉快。
t_en: No problem! Hope you enjoy your visit here!

t_ch: 啊！你是那个——！
t_en: Ah! You're the—

t_ch: 不，你就是那个——浣熊前辈！啊…也不对，你是星穹列车的{NICKNAME}！嗷嗷！还有三月兔小姐本人也来了吗？
t_en: No way, you're... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Raccoon! Ah... no, that's not right, you're {NICKNAME} from the Astral Express! Wow! And is Miss March Bunny herself here too?

t_ch: …你好，我还是更喜欢别人叫我本名三月七。这位是瓦尔特•杨先生。
t_en: ...Hi, I actually prefer to be called by my real name, March 7th. This is Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 一次遇见了三位列车组乘员，好幸运啊！我是大家的粉丝，尤其是{NICKNAME}前辈！《苍天航路绒绒号》每一期我都没错过，典藏本也都买了！
t_en: How lucky to meet three members of the Express Crew at once! I'm a huge fan of you all, especially my senior {NICKNAME}! I haven't missed a single episode of Fluffy Across the Blue, and I've even bought all the collector's editions!

t_ch: 可恶，居然当着本姑娘的面说更喜欢{NICKNAME}…还好咱没那么小心眼。
t_en: How could this guy say he likes {NICKNAME} more than me to my face... Good thing I'm not that petty.

t_ch: 放宽心，小三月。很难说这个世界的人喜爱的究竟是真正的列车组，还是绒绒号里的小动物列车组。
t_en: Don't worry, March. It's hard to tell if people in this world love the real Express Crew, or just the cute animal crew from The Fluffy.

t_ch: 我可不止追绒绒号的连载，各位在贝城、仙舟、匹诺康尼，还有翁法罗斯的冒险新闻，我一直都有关注！可惜，翁法罗斯之战的视频资源网上实在太少了。
t_en: I don't just follow The Fluffy series! I've been keeping tabs on all your adventures in Belobog, the Xianzhou, Penacony, and Amphoreus! Though it's such a shame there's so little video footage of the Amphorean War online.

t_ch: 对了，我昨天还重温了前辈在《圣杯/今晚留下来》再度踏上开拓之旅的情节！呜呜，前辈的发言真是太励志啦！
t_en: Oh right, I just rewatched the scene where the Trailblazer embarked on another trailblazing expedition in Holy Grail/stay night! Your speech was so inspiring!

t_ch: 快别说了，怪不好意思的。
t_en: Aw, stop it, you're making me blush.

t_ch: 能走到现在，是大家的功劳！
t_en: I couldn't have made it this far without some team effort!

t_ch: 身为传奇英雄竟然还这么谦逊，不愧是吾辈的表率！
t_en: Such modesty from a legendary hero. What a stellar role model for all of us!

t_ch: 对了，我家里还珍藏着一个垃圾桶，早知道今天能遇见{NICKNAME}前辈，我就该把那个桶带上的。
t_en: Oh right, I have a precious trashcan in my collection at home. If I'd've known I'd meet my senior {NICKNAME} today, I'd have brought that can with me.

t_ch: 我能冒昧地要个签名吗？…就、就请签在衣服上吧，这件衣服我打算一辈子都不洗了！
t_en: Could I ask for your autograph, if that's okay with you? J-just sign my clothes, please! I'm never gonna wash this ever again!

t_ch: 哈哈，小朋友这个样子和十分钟前的我简直一模一样。
t_en: Haha, you're acting exactly like me from ten minutes ago, kid.

t_ch: 别担心，{NICKNAME}是不会立刻飞走的。倒是你，噼里啪啦讲了半天，来个自我介绍，让你的偶像{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}了解你一下吧。
t_en: Don't worry, {NICKNAME} won't fly away just yet. As for you, you've been chattering away nonstop... How about giving us a proper introduction so that your idol gets to know you better.

t_ch: 抱歉！都怪我太激动了。
t_en: Sorry! I got way too excited!

t_ch: 我是《破晓战队》里的灰烬战士，本名…本名不重要，你们叫我「灰烬」就好！
t_en: I'm Warrior Cinderborne from Daybreak Squadron, and my real name... well, my real name doesn't matter. Just call me Cinderborne!

t_ch: 几位要是不着急的话，可以和我再聊几句吗？
t_en: If you're not in a hurry, would you mind chatting with me for a bit?

t_ch: 我其实不太了解破晓战队…
t_en: I actually don't know much about Daybreak Squadron...

t_ch: 《破晓战队》是满愿电视台超级英雄剧「机铠战士系列」中人气最高的一作，讲述与机铠们合体作战的少年少女们，对抗黑暗之蛇，拯救二相乐园的故事。
t_en: Daybreak Squadron is the most popular superhero drama in Fulwish TV's Mechatron Warrior Series, following the story of young heroes fighting alongside mechatrons against the Shadow Slither to save Planarcadia.

t_ch: 真没想到…杨先生对咱们的故事背景这么熟悉！
t_en: I never expected... Mr. Yang to be so familiar with our story's background!

t_ch: 毕竟，我也是你们的忠实观众啊。
t_en: After all, I'm a loyal fan of your show.

t_ch: 那可真是太荣幸了！
t_en: I'm truly honored!

t_ch: 所以你平时做些什么？
t_en: So what do you usually get up to around here?

t_ch: 我只是个小演员，在电视剧里扮演着英雄。就像{NICKNAME}前辈的事迹鼓舞着我一样，破晓战队也在努力鼓舞大家，对抗生活中的一切困难！
t_en: I'm just a small-time actor, playing a hero on TV. And like how my senior {NICKNAME}'s deeds inspired me, Daybreak Squadron has also motivated people to fight against all challenges in real life!

t_ch: 最近，满愿电视台向「异常防御部」提交的申请得到了许可，剧里的「魔动机铠•破晓战士」可以在现世中行动了。我和几个朋友很荣幸能和真正的疾锋龙一起战斗！
t_en: Recently, Fulwish TV got approval from the Department of Aberration Defense, so now the "Magico Mechatron: Daybreak Warriors" from the show can operate in reality. My friends and I are just honored to fight alongside the real Bullet Wyrm!

t_ch: 抱歉，我没听明白，所以，你还是不是演员？
t_en: Sorry, I didn't quite understand that. So, are you still an actor or not?

t_ch: 该怎么说呢，我和战队的伙伴们既是演员，也是真正的蒙面英雄！一旦城市发生灾害，邪恶威胁市民时，我们会和机铠战士一起出现，保护大家的！
t_en: How should I put this... My teammates and I are both actors AND real masked heroes! Whenever disaster strikes the city or evil threatens citizens, we show up alongside mechatron warriors to protect everyone!

t_ch: 你今天来珠星做什么？
t_en: What brings you to Pearluxe Corp today?

t_ch: 我今天来是为测试机铠性能，顺便参加一些广告拍摄的工作。
t_en: I'm here today to test a mechatron's performance and do some advertising shoots while I'm at it.

t_ch: 满愿电视台和咱们一直都有合作，战队变身使用的也是由珠星财团幻造的机铠。
t_en: Fulwish TV and Pearluxe Corp have always been partners. Even the squad's transformation mechatron is imagenated by Pearluxe Corp.

t_ch: 《破晓战队》的剧集越受欢迎，给予机铠的愿力就越多，也会让战队在现实中大放异彩。而他们的战队越是活跃，珠星的模玩自然就卖得越好——真是完美的良性闭环！
t_en: The more popular Daybreak Squadron's drama becomes, the more Wishpower flows into the mechatrons, making the squad shine even brighter in reality. And the more active they are, the better Pearluxe Corp's model kits sell. It's a perfect virtuous cycle!

t_ch: 我们该继续参观流程了吧？
t_en: Shouldn't we continue with the tour now?

t_ch: 占用了几位宝贵的时间闲聊，真是抱歉！
t_en: Sorry for taking up your precious time with all this chit-chat!

t_ch: 如果列车组还没有参观战斗测试区——我想毛遂自荐成为{NICKNAME}前辈战斗测试的对手，不知您意下如何？
t_en: If the Crew hasn't visited the combat testing area yet, I'd like to volunteer myself as my senior {NICKNAME}'s opponent for the test, if that's alright with you?

t_ch: 这没问题吗？
t_en: Is that really okay?

t_ch: 不会对这儿造成破坏吗？
t_en: Wouldn't it cause damage to the place?

t_ch: 我当然知道前辈的球棒一击就能把咱们全都打飞。这一次，是想请您体验机铠同步战斗！
t_en: Of course I know your bat could send us all flying with a single hit. This time, we'd like to invite you to experience synchronized mechatron combat!

t_ch: 星穹列车的大英雄能有幸指点我们，留下一些数据，这里的工作人员一定会很高兴的！
t_en: The hero of the Astral Express gracing us with guidance and leaving some data would surely make the staff here very happy!

t_ch: 哎呀，真是赶巧，战斗测试区也在今天的参观环节里。
t_en: Oh, what perfect timing! The combat testing area is also part of today's tour.

t_ch: 哈哈，{NICKNAME}，这就是名气的重量，可不要让仰望你的后辈失望啊。
t_en: Haha, {NICKNAME}, that's the weight of fame for ya! Don't let down those kids who look up to you.

t_ch: 唉，真拿可爱的后辈没办法。
t_en: Honestly, that's my weakness, I can't allow myself to let adorable kids down.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我先让各位操作大厅里那座机铠的装配流程……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>First have everyone take part in the assembly process for the mechatron in the control room...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>然后以这座机铠为模板，为{NICKNAME}生产一台小型机，让{F#她}{M#他}体验一下战斗测试项目。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Then, using this mechatron as a template, we'll build a smaller unit for {NICKNAME} so {M#he}{F#she} can try out the combat test program.</color>

t_ch: 这里是珠星的机铠幻造设计室。
t_en: This is Pearluxe Corp's Mechatron Imagenesis Design Lab.

t_ch: 距今十五年前，二相乐园的第一批机铠于此地诞生，一经面世便立刻赢得了广泛的社会影响力。
t_en: Fifteen years ago, the first mechatrons of Planarcadia were born here, and they immediately gained widespread social influence upon their debut.

t_ch: 现如今，机铠已经成为了大街小巷最常见、最具代表性的符号。
t_en: Today, mechatrons have become the most common and iconic symbol throughout the streets.

t_ch: 可以说，机铠是第一个，也是目前唯一能被流水线量产的幻造种。
t_en: You could say that mechatrons are the first, and currently only, imagenae that can be mass-produced on assembly lines.

t_ch: 二相乐园需要这么多机铠吗？
t_en: Does Planarcadia really need that many mechatrons?

t_ch: 像机铠这样可以随心所欲生产、停产的幻造种，简直是再理想不过的二相乐园居民了——也许，也是再理想不过的公司雇员了。
t_en: Imagenae such as mechatrons, which can be produced and discontinued at will, are the perfect residents for Planarcadia, and perhaps, the perfect IPC employees too.

t_ch: 在某些人看来，要是能制造出一支无穷无尽的机铠大军那可就更好了。
t_en: In some people's eyes, being able to create an infinite army of mechatrons would be even better.

t_ch: 珠星改变了二相乐园。
t_en: Pearluxe Corp have changed Planarcadia.

t_ch: 唔，珠星财团确实促进了二相乐园幻造种向现代化转变。
t_en: Hmm, Pearluxe Corp has indeed driven the modernization of imagenae in Planarcadia.

t_ch: 说不定未来还会有更加奇特的幻造种被创造出来呢。
t_en: Who knows, maybe even stranger imagenae will be created in the future!

t_ch: 不知道各位客人是否了解，要想在二相乐园创生幻造种，第一步要做些什么？
t_en: Say, dear guests, do you know what the first step is to creating an imagenae in Planarcadia?

t_ch: 绘制形体。
t_en: Drawing the physical form.

t_ch: 不愧是无名客，对自己踏足世界的风土人情很了解嘛。
t_en: As expected of the Nameless, you're quite knowledgeable about the customs and culture of the world you've set foot in.

t_ch: 向阿哈许愿。
t_en: Making a wish to Aha.

t_ch: …很遗憾，祂不在服务区。是绘制形体啦……
t_en: Sorry, but THEY're out of the service area right now. Actually, it's about drawing the physical form...

t_ch: 向异常防御部递交申请…
t_en: Submitting an application to the Department of Aberration Defense?

t_ch: …某种意义上说，这个答案倒也不能算错。
t_en: ...Well, in a way, that answer isn't exactly wrong.

t_ch: 但就像人类立法也管不住刮风下雨一样，平均每年有二十二万例未经许可的非法幻造种在人类有意无意的创造下来到世上，「异常防御部」也只能睁一只眼闭一只眼。
t_en: But just like how human laws can't control wind and rain, an average of <unbreak>220,000</unbreak> unauthorized imagenae come into existence each year through humanity's intentional or unintentional creation, and the Department of Aberration Defense can only turn a blind eye.

t_ch: 「绘制形体」，意味着人类以画笔将虚构之物绘画成形。这原本是绘师的专业领域。
t_en: Drawing the physical form means humans using brushes to give shape to fictional beings, which was originally the domain of professional artists.

t_ch: 但在这儿，集体创作、统一规格的机铠设计图取代了传统作画，提高了标准化工作效率，减少了愿力资源浪费——总之，这就是大家追求的「工业化冲击」。
t_en: But here, collective creation and standardized mechatron blueprints have replaced traditional artwork, improving standardized workflow efficiency and reducing Wishpower resource waste. In short, this is THE industrial revolution everyone's been chasing.

t_ch: 连幻造这样像魔法一样的技艺…居然也能工业化。我突然有些佩服公司了。
t_en: To think that even imagenesis, a skill as magical as this... could be industrialized. I'm suddenly starting to admire the IPC.

t_ch: 这不算什么！本公司志在于乐园历<unbreak>2030</unbreak>年到来之前，创造<unbreak>20</unbreak>亿投入社会生产与服务的机铠——其中还包含了像破晓战队那样具有战斗能力的特殊机铠。
t_en: That's nothing! Our company aims to create 2 billion mechatrons for social production and public services before Arcadian Calendar <unbreak>2030</unbreak>, and that includes special combat mechatrons like the Daybreak Squadron!

t_ch: 真是个惊人的数字，但人们的愿力真的能支撑这样规模的幻造种数量吗？
t_en: That's a staggering number, but can the Wishpower of the people here really sustain so many imagenae?

t_ch: 所以珠星才会制作一部又一部的动画和英雄片啊。在其他世界，这些不过是消遣之物，但在这里，它可是货真价实的精神能量的培养基。
t_en: That's why Pearluxe Corp keeps churning out animations and hero shows one after another. In other places, these are just entertainment, but here, they're legit breeding grounds for spiritual energy.

t_ch: 这一切都将服务于真珠女士的远大目标和理想！
t_en: All of this shall serve Madam Pearl's grand goals and ideals!

t_ch: 好了，回到话题的原点，第一步，让我们先去打印「机铠结构设计图」吧。
t_en: Alright, back to square one. First step, let's go print the mechatron structure blueprint.

t_ch: 请根据您的设计需要，调整机铠设计参数。
t_en: Please adjust the mechatron design parameters according to your needs.

t_ch: 假装调整参数，最后恢复默认。
t_en: Pretend to adjust the parameters, then restore to default.

t_ch: 打开预设参数，认真挑选一组。
t_en: Open the preset parameters and carefully pick a set.

t_ch: 坚持仔细调整每个参数到满意…
t_en: Keep fine-tuning each parameter until satisfied...

t_ch: 机铠装配设计图已更新，处理中……
t_en: Mechatron assembly blueprint updated, processing...

t_ch: 正在打印……
t_en: Printing...

t_ch: 在生成图纸的间歇，你突然意识到，这是个体验项目。
t_en: While waiting for the blueprint to generate, it suddenly hits you: This is just a trial project.

t_ch: 难道说，不管我怎么调整，最终打印出来的结果都是一模一样的？
t_en: Could it be that no matter how much I adjust it, the final printout always comes out exactly the same?

t_ch: 你的怀疑，很有道理…不过请先回答我的问题，对于你来说，你是更喜欢「付出努力收获的成就感」，还是「轻松完成的便捷感」？
t_en: Your suspicion makes sense... But please answer my question first: Which do you prefer, the sense of achievement that comes from hard work, or the convenience of getting things done easily?

t_ch: 努力后的成就感。
t_en: The sense of achievement that comes from hard work.

t_ch: 轻松完成的便捷感。
t_en: The convenience of getting things done easily.

t_ch: 我全都要！
t_en: I want them BOTH!

t_ch: 那就对了，全自动化的幻造蓝图设计系统完美适配你的要求——你可以精心设置每一个参数，也可以一键跳过，到最后自动化系统总会产出符合标准的成果。
t_en: You got that right! The fully automated imagenesis blueprint design system perfectly matches your needs. You can meticulously adjust every parameter, or just hit one button to skip it all, and the automated system will always produce results that meet the standards.

t_ch: 很伟大吧！就像当年螺丝星的发明家们总会问自己的：如果自己造出的一切成果已经在「至上打孔带」中预先记录了，那么发明的意义何在？
t_en: Amazing, right? Just like how the inventors on Planet Screwllum used to ask themselves: If all their inventions were already pre-recorded in the Supreme Punch Tape, what's the point of inventing in the first place?

t_ch: 打印已完成，请取出图纸。
t_en: Printing complete. Please retrieve your blueprint.

t_ch: 你刚才的话就是答案，我们享受的并非创造结果，而是其中的「欢愉」。
t_en: What you just said is the answer: It's not about the results of creation, but the "Elation" we experience in the process.

t_ch: 您好，请出示您的「机铠装配设计图」。
t_en: Hello, please show me your mechatron assembly blueprint.

t_ch: （提交设计图）
t_en: (Submit blueprint)

t_ch: 没问题，设计图已经录入。机铠的板件已经准备就绪，祝您体验愉快！
t_en: No problem, the blueprint has been recorded. The mechatron parts are ready to go. Hope you enjoy the experience!

t_ch: 杨叔不一起吗？
t_en: Mr. Yang, you're not coming along?

t_ch: 三月不一起吗？
t_en: March, aren't you coming along?

t_ch: 不用啦，你还是带上杨叔吧！
t_en: Nah, you should take Mr. Yang with you instead!

t_ch: 不了不了，我和小三月在一旁看着你玩就好。
t_en: No, no, March and I will just watch you play from the side.

t_ch: 那么，接下来，请{NICKNAME}按照我的指引，完成机铠拼装。
t_en: Now then, {NICKNAME}, please follow my guidance to complete the mechatron assembly.

t_ch: 本次体验主要包括三块板件的拼装——手臂、肩甲，以及机铠背后的破晓战刃。
t_en: This experience mainly involves assembling three parts: The arm, the shoulder armor, and the Daybreak Blade on the back of the mechatron.

t_ch: 去吧！{NICKNAME}，拼装「魔动机铠•破晓战士」，拯救我们的城市！
t_en: Go for it, {NICKNAME}! Assemble the "Magico Mechatron: Daybreak Warriors" and save our city!

t_ch: 各位，我出发了！
t_en: Alright everyone, I'm heading out!

t_ch: 去吧，我和小三月在一旁看着你玩就好。
t_en: Go ahead. March and I will watch you play from the side.

t_ch: 快去吧，你的小粉丝还等着你呢。
t_en: Go now. Your little fans are waiting for you.

t_ch: 大功告成，由你亲手完成的巨型机铠，从今天就将矗立在这座大厅的中央！
t_en: Mission accomplished! The colossal mechatron you built with your own hands will now stand proudly in the center of this hall!

t_ch: 星穹列车的大英雄亲临此处，留下设计图，并为机铠雕像的落成贡献了自己的灵感！——这对市场部门来说是多好的宣发物料！
t_en: The great hero of the Astral Express has graced this place, left behind a blueprint, and even contributed their own inspiration to the completion of the mechatron statue! What outstanding promotional material this is for the marketing department.

t_ch: 哼哼，新的英雄于此诞生。
t_en: Heh heh, a new hero is born right here.

t_ch: 进入其中吧！{NICKNAME}，成为二相乐园的守护者——！
t_en: Step forth, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, and become the Guardian of Planarcadia!

t_ch: 我来组成头部！
t_en: I'll be the head!

t_ch: 检测到强大愿力供应个体，即将启动对接——
t_en: Powerful Wishpower supply entity detected, initiating link...

t_ch: 机铠对接同步率…<unbreak>15%</unbreak>。
t_en: Mechatron synchronization rate... <unbreak>15%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 装配完成了，接下来的环节，莫非是……？
t_en: Assembly complete. Could the next step be...?

t_ch: Bingo！机铠装配结束，随之而来的当然是激动人心的战斗啦！
t_en: That's right! With the completion of mechatron assembly, it's time for some heart-pounding combat!

t_ch: 机铠对接同步率…<unbreak>39%</unbreak>…<unbreak>42%</unbreak>……
t_en: Mechatron synchronization rate... <unbreak>39%</unbreak>... <unbreak>42%</unbreak>...

t_ch: 你的小迷弟灰烬可是满心期盼你能给他们一点指点呢！
t_en: Your little fanboy, Cinderborne, is eagerly awaiting some pointers from you!

t_ch: 虽然没法驱动这座大家伙，但我打印了一台小型机体。接下来，该让你体验一下机铠是如何战斗的了。
t_en: While we can't power up this big guy, I've printed a small unit. Now, it's time to show you how a mechatron fights.

t_ch: 我…和机铠合为一体了？这…又是哪里啊？
t_en: I... merged with the mechatron? Where... where am I now?

t_ch: 当然是——战斗测试沙盒啦！
t_en: Why of course, it's the Combat Testing Sandbox!

t_ch: 朝着我们走来的，可是星穹列车大名鼎鼎的开拓者{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Could it be the one and only Trailblazer {NICKNAME} of the Astral Express walking towards us?

t_ch: 正是，请叫我「银河球棒侠」。
t_en: That's right, please call me Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: 银河球棒侠，我们一直在期待你的到来！
t_en: Galactic Baseballer, we've been expecting you!

t_ch: 我去，对面这是什么造型？
t_en: Whoa, what's with that crazy getup over there?

t_ch: 这就是我们破晓战队的机铠，帅吧！
t_en: This is Daybreak Squadron's mechatron. Pretty cool, huh?

t_ch: 我都变这样了，你也能认出我？
t_en: You can still recognize me in this form?

t_ch: 当然了，毕竟你可是我们心目中的前辈啊！
t_en: You bet! After all, you're our beloved hero!

t_ch: 尽管二维市的巨影危机已经被解除，但是属于你和破晓战队的战斗才刚刚开始。
t_en: Although the giant shadow crisis in Duomension City has been dispelled, the real battle for you and the Daybreak Squadron is only just beginning.

t_ch: …作为新旧两代超级英雄，你们将在这里分出高下！
t_en: ...As the old and new generations of superheroes, you will face off here to determine the victor!

t_ch: 烈火铸魂！燃尽晦暗！燎原的恒星，赤焰战士！
t_en: Forged by raging fire! Burn away the darkness! The star that sets the world ablaze—Blazeweaver!

t_ch: 划破长空！翼展如电！碧蓝的苍穹，苍翼战士！
t_en: Slice through the skies! Wings of lightning! From the blue heavens descend—Azurewing!

t_ch: 驱散永夜！光芒如炬！辉耀的祈愿，曙光战士！
t_en: Shatter the eternal night! Light blazing bright! The radiant vow of hope—Dawnlance!

t_ch: 斩破绝望！锋锐如钢！不灭的利刃，灰烬战士！——前辈，加油！
t_en: Cut through despair! Unyielding blade of steel! Edge that never fades—Cinderborne! You can do it, friend!

t_ch: 暗夜终尽，黎明降临！破晓战队，登场！
t_en: Darkness wanes, and dawn awakens! The Daybreak Squadron arises!

t_ch: 破晓战队！这也太帅了吧！
t_en: Daybreak Squadron! That was so cool!

t_ch: 等等，现在是什么剧情了？
t_en: Hold on, where are we in the story now?

t_ch: 尬到抠脚！这是什么情况？
t_en: This is so cringe! What's going on?

t_ch: 这是一次来自破晓战队的正式挑战！星穹列车的大英雄！
t_en: This is an official challenge from the Daybreak Squadron, great hero of the Astral Express!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，如果我们战胜了你，希望你能接受我们的邀请，成为<color=#dbc291ff>「破晓战队的名誉幻之第五人」</color>，一起守护二相乐园的和平！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if we defeat you, we hope you'll accept our invitation to become the <color=#dbc291ff>"Honorary Phantom Fifth Member of the Daybreak Squadron"</color> and help us safeguard the peace of Planarcadia!

t_ch: 放心吧，我是不会输的。
t_en: Don't worry, I won't lose.

t_ch: 我很欣赏你的自信。
t_en: I admire your confidence.

t_ch: 别吧，我还想继续开拓呢…
t_en: Nah, I still want to continue Trailblazing...

t_ch: 是名誉啦！是名誉队员！
t_en: Honorary! It's an honorary position!

t_ch: 他是灰色，我用什么颜色呢？
t_en: He's already gray. So, what other color can I use?

t_ch: 粉色、绿色、黑色…我们还有很多颜色，你可以指定任意RGB值！
t_en: Pink, Green... we've got tons of colors, you can set any RGB value you want!

t_ch: 对了小灰，你不是还有话想和前辈说吗？现在就是最好的机会了！
t_en: Hey Gray, didn't you have something to tell your hero? Now's your perfect chance!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}前辈，你知道吗？每次机铠变身时，我都会想象自己就是你，我会想象你在遇到危难时会怎么做；是你的冒险故事给了我力量……
t_en: My friend, {NICKNAME}, you know what? Every time I transform into a mechatron, I imagine I'm you. I think about what you would do when facing danger. It is your adventure stories that give me strength...

t_ch: 接下来我会全力以赴，也请您不要手下留情！
t_en: So I'll give it my all from now on. Please don't hold back!

t_ch: 废话少说，直接开始吧！
t_en: Cut the chatter. Let's get to it!

t_ch: 就让我给你一些指点吧！
t_en: In that case, let me give you some pointers!

t_ch: 那么——
t_en: Now then...

t_ch: 在幻月升起的地平线上一决胜负吧。
t_en: Let's settle this on the horizon where the Phantasmoon rises.

t_ch: 很入戏嘛！{NICKNAME}，演得很好！
t_en: You really got into character! {NICKNAME}, that was some great acting!

t_ch: 诶…刚才我们是在摄影棚里战斗吗？！
t_en: Eh... Were we just fighting in a film studio?

t_ch: 哈哈，你该不会以为自己在真正的城市里和他们交手吧？那可不成，真珠女士的保险基金可是要赔到破产的！
t_en: Haha, don't tell me you actually thought you were fighting them in a real city? That ain't gonna happen. Madam Pearl's insurance fund would collapse!

t_ch: 真真假假都不重要，重要的是你的体验——你，有没有玩得很开心？
t_en: It doesn't matter if it was a real fight or a fake one. What matters is your experience: Did you have fun?

t_ch: 爽，能再打一场就好了。
t_en: Heck yeah, I wish I could go for another round.

t_ch: 用户反馈了五星好评。感谢亲的好评，您的满意和肯定是我们最大的动力！
t_en: The user gave us a five-star review. Thank you for your kind feedback! Your satisfaction and approval are our greatest motivators!

t_ch: 也就这样吧，评价一般。
t_en: Meh, just so-so.

t_ch: 呃…总之默认用户反馈五星好评。希望下次还能为您服务。
t_en: Uh... anyway, I'll just take it as a default 5-star review. Hope to serve you again next time.

t_ch: …怎么你就自动好评了。
t_en: ...How could you just automatically give it a positive rating?

t_ch: 破晓战队的人好像在等你，看来你给他们好好上了一堂战斗课啊。去给这些后辈讲几句吧？
t_en: Looks like the Daybreak Squadron is waiting for you. You gave them quite a combat lesson, it appears! Why don't you go share a few words with those youngsters?

t_ch: 不愧是{NICKNAME}前辈，真是太帅了！呜呜呜，感觉我这辈子都值了……
t_en: As expected of my senior {NICKNAME}, that was awesome! My life is now complete...

t_ch: 在加入破晓战队之前，小灰可一直都是你的粉丝。
t_en: Before joining Daybreak Squadron, Gray had always been your fan.

t_ch: 这小子对星穹列车的故事如数家珍，总是将你视作榜样…就算是作为队长的我，在他的心中也远不及你。
t_en: That kid knows every story about the Astral Express like the back of his hand, and he's always looked up to you as his role model... Even as his leader, I'm nowhere near as important to him as you are.

t_ch: 真是一场精彩的战斗！哎，比起战胜你，我们更希望小灰能给你留下深刻印象。
t_en: What an amazing battle! Well, more than beating you, we were hoping Gray would leave a lasting impression on you.

t_ch: 毕竟对于一位粉丝来说，被偶像记在心里才是最高的赞赏，不是吗？
t_en: After all, being remembered by their idol is the highest form of praise for a fan, isn't it?

t_ch: 你们战队的关系真好啊。
t_en: Your team really gets along well.

t_ch: 当然的，除了{NICKNAME}前辈，破晓战队的哥哥姐姐们就是我最信任的人了。
t_en: Oh, you bet! Besides my senior {NICKNAME}, my teammates in the Daybreak Squadron are the ones I trust the most.

t_ch: 我会记住今天这场战斗的。
t_en: I will remember this battle today.

t_ch: 能在{NICKNAME}前辈的心中留下一个「灰烬战士」的名字，我就已经很满足了。
t_en: I'm already satisfied just knowing that the name Cinderborne will remain in my senior {NICKNAME}'s memory.

t_ch: 可惜啊，如果{NICKNAME}真的能成为我们小队的第五人，我们的知名度还会进一步上升…毕竟还有很多人认为我们只是在「扮演英雄」。
t_en: It's a shame though... if {NICKNAME} could really become the fifth member of our team, our recognition would rise even further... after all, many people still think we're just playing hero.

t_ch: 那是因为我们还没做出什么像样的壮举嘛……
t_en: That's only because we haven't done anything truly heroic yet...

t_ch: 不必担心，以二维市的状况，迟早会出现炸翻天的大危机——那时候就有我们大展身手的用武之地啦！哈哈。
t_en: Don't worry! Given the state of Duomension City, a mind-blowing crisis is bound to happen sooner or later. And that's when we'll get our chance to shine! Haha.

t_ch: 是啊，我昨天刚从一场瓦斯爆炸事故里救了五个人，希望他们快点养好伤，好好宣传一下破晓战队的神勇。
t_en: Yeah, just yesterday I rescued five people from a gas explosion. Hope they recover soon and spread the word about how awesome Daybreak Squadron is!

t_ch: 你们又在若无其事说些怪话了！
t_en: There you go again, casually saying the strangest things!

t_ch: 要像星穹列车那样，不要为证明什么而行动，只要在自己的道路上一直走下去就好。迟早有一天，破晓战队会得到所有人的认可！
t_en: Like the Astral Express, we don't need to act to prove something so long as we stay true to our own path. Sooner or later, Daybreak Squadron will be recognized by everyone!

t_ch: 哈哈，你这个笨蛋，脑子里只有星穹列车吗？要不你干脆去星穹列车当个无名客吧！
t_en: Haha, silly you! Is the Astral Express all you ever think about? Why don't you just go join the Express as one of the Nameless!

t_ch: 你就别拿我开玩笑了，队长！我还是个不成熟的家伙，怎么有资格登上列车和前辈并肩作战呢？
t_en: Come on, don't make fun of me! I'm still just a rookie. How could I possibly be worthy of boarding the Express and fighting alongside seasoned veterans?

t_ch: 只要坚持在自己的道路上…
t_en: So long as you stay true to your own path...

t_ch: 你们都是了不起的英雄。
t_en: You guys are all remarkable heroes.

t_ch: 每个在自己的生命里坚持下去的人，都是英雄！
t_en: Anyone who perseveres in their own life is a hero indeed!

t_ch: 谢谢你的指点，前辈！
t_en: Thanks for your guidance, Trailblazer!

t_ch: 最后，我想拜托您和我们大家合照！
t_en: And lastly, I wonder if you could take a picture with the rest of us?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，既然如此，开拓者{NICKNAME}，请和我们一起合个影吧！
t_en: Hahaha, Trailblazer {NICKNAME}, please take a photo together with us!

t_ch: 时间差不多了，接下来该去和真珠女士会面了。
t_en: Time's about up. We should meet with Madam Pearl now.

t_ch: 对了，在走之前要不要和你的迷弟告别一下？
t_en: Oh right, wanna say goodbye to your big fan before we go?

t_ch: 阿蓝，阿黄，你们刚才的表现真是不错。录下来作为宣传素材，一定能涨不少粉丝！
t_en: Blue, Yellow, you guys were amazing back there. If we record this for promo material, we'll definitely get a ton of new followers!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，要是咱们几个能打败无名客就好了…机铠大战的时候，其实就差那么一点点。
t_en: Hehe, if only we could've beaten the Nameless... We were actually so close during that mechatron fight.

t_ch: 说什么啊，咱们怎么可能打赢{NICKNAME}前辈啊！
t_en: What are you talking about? There's no way we could've beaten {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 其实…也不是完全不可能，对吧？自从接受了转变，我感觉自己的头脑也好、身体也罢，一下子就变得轻快多了！小灰，你真的应该和我们一样……
t_en: Well... It's not entirely impossible, I'd say. Ever since I converted, I feel like both my mind and body have become so much lighter! Gray, you really should join us and do the same...

t_ch: 哈哈，小灰，作为蒙面英雄就是要面对各种危险的。如果在我们最需要你的时候，你却无法为这支队伍贡献自己的力量，你一定也会感到难过的吧！
t_en: Haha, Gray, being a masked hero means facing all kinds of dangers. You'd definitely feel pretty bad if you couldn't contribute your strength to the team when we needed you the most!

t_ch: 啊，你的偶像来看你了。咱们几个就不在这碍事了。后台等你哦，小灰。
t_en: Oh, looks like your idol's here to see you. We'll wait for you backstage, Gray.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}前辈。
t_en: Senior {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 你还好吗？
t_en: You good?

t_ch: 我？我没事，我好的很，不愧是前辈，轻松就打倒了我们。
t_en: Me? I'm fine, totally fine. It was no surprise that you took us down without breaking a sweat.

t_ch: 抱歉，刚刚没有放水。
t_en: Sorry, I didn't go easy on you just now.

t_ch: 哎？怎么突然道歉起来了。没事的。不愧是前辈啊，轻松就打倒了我们几个。
t_en: Huh? Why the sudden apology? It's fine. It was no surprise that you took us down without breaking a sweat.

t_ch: 是我，太软弱了啊…不管战斗也好，处世也好，都犹豫不决。虽然我知道自己不可能成为像{NICKNAME}那样了不起的英雄，但我一直也在努力向着你的形象靠近。
t_en: It's me... I'm just too weak... I'm always hesitant, whether in combat or dealing with life. Even though I know I can never become an amazing hero like you, {NICKNAME}, I've always been trying my best to get closer to being like you.

t_ch: 不怕你笑话，从小没有谁教过我做人做事的原则。高中没读多久，就跟着街头的大哥混在一起。每次挥拳威胁别人时，还以为自己很有英雄气概。
t_en: It's a bit embarrassing to admit, but no one ever taught me the principles of how to live and behave growing up. I dropped out of high school pretty early and started hanging out with street gangs. Every time I threw a punch to intimidate someone, I thought I was being a hero.

t_ch: 只是，看到那些人害怕的样子，又隐隐觉得我是不是做错了。
t_en: But when I saw how scared those people were, I had this nagging feeling that maybe I was doing something wrong.

t_ch: 后来我在网上看到星穹列车的故事…了解了{NICKNAME}前辈的传奇，我才意识到什么是真正的英雄。一想到过去的自己多么…幼稚、混蛋，我就下定决心脱离了原来的团体。
t_en: Later, when I read about the Astral Express story online... and learned about your legendary deeds, {NICKNAME}, I finally understood what it meant to be a true hero. Looking back at how... immature and awful I was, I made up my mind to leave my old organization.

t_ch: 现在，我也有了和前辈一样可以成为英雄的机会——我和破晓战队的哥哥姐姐一起，能为二相乐园的居民带去幸福的笑容，也可以在有危险出现时守护他们……
t_en: Now, I too have a chance to become a hero like you. Together with my brothers and sisters in the Daybreak Squadron, I can bring happy smiles to residents of Planarcadia and protect them whenever danger appears...

t_ch: 但我…实在太弱小了。我没有列车无名客那样强大的力量，甚至没什么特别的长处…我也许走上了一条不太合适自己的路啊。
t_en: But I'm... just too weak. I don't have the immense strength like the Express Nameless, I don't even have any special talents... Maybe I've chosen a path that doesn't really work for me.

t_ch: 想为别人而战就是长处。
t_en: The desire to fight for others is a strength in itself.

t_ch: 我不想说些人定胜天的话来敷衍你。但我觉得，善良是无法靠后天获得的能力，力量却可以……
t_en: I don't want to give you empty platitudes about humans triumphing over fate. But I do believe that while kindness isn't something you can learn, strength is something you can acquire...

t_ch: 你想为你身边的人战斗，想给别人带去笑容的心意，就是你最大的长处。
t_en: Your desire to fight for those around you, and your wish to bring smiles to others... that's your greatest strength.

t_ch: 无名客的长处并非力量。
t_en: Strength isn't the Nameless' strong suit.

t_ch: 笨蛋，这个银河里有太多拥有力量的人，但不是每一个拥有力量的人都会选择成为无名客。
t_en: Silly you, there are plenty of powerful ones in this cosmos, but not everyone with strength chooses to become a Nameless.

t_ch: 你想为你身边的人战斗，想给别人带去笑容的心意，这就是最好的开始。
t_en: Your desire to fight for those around you, and your wish to bring smiles to others... that's a good place to start.

t_ch: 谢谢你，前辈！谢谢你肯听我絮絮叨叨说这些。
t_en: Thank you, Trailblazer! Thanks for listening to my ramblings.

t_ch: 我来给你签个名吧。
t_en: Let me give you my autograph.

t_ch: 请、请签那个名台词——
t_en: C-Could you please sign that famous line...

t_ch: 愿此行，终抵群星？
t_en: May this journey lead us starward?

t_ch: 这句也不赖啊。
t_en: That one is not bad either.

t_ch: 嗯，因为先看到了星星，无名客才有了旅途。我觉得你眼中已经有了星星。
t_en: Yeah, it was the stars that first set the Nameless on their journey. And now I can see that same starlight in your eyes.

t_ch: 规则，就是用来打破的！
t_en: Rules are made to be broken!

t_ch: 没、没错，就是这句！
t_en: That's the one! That's exactly it!

t_ch: 规则是一种边界，任何让自己超越边界的人，都是某种意义的无名客。
t_en: Rules are boundaries, and anyone who pushes beyond those boundaries becomes, in a sense, one of the Nameless.

t_ch: 我会用余生来记住今天的！再见前辈，希望下一次见面，我可以成为像您一样的真正的英雄。
t_en: I'll remember today for the rest of my life! Goodbye, Trailblazer. I hope by the next time we meet, I'll be a true hero just like you.

t_ch: 今天的参观流程到这儿也差不多了。这一路下来，不知你有何感想？
t_en: Well, that about wraps up today's tour. After seeing everything, what do you think?

t_ch: 我的粉丝可真不少。
t_en: Looks like I've got quite a few fans!

t_ch: 你才发现吗？这可是你加入幻月游戏的最大优势…一个已然广为流传的故事。
t_en: You're only realizing that now? That's your greatest advantage in joining the Phantasmoon Games... a story that's already spread far and wide.

t_ch: 珠星的影响力可真不小。
t_en: Pearluxe Corp's influence is truly something else.

t_ch: 嗯，比起管理这个世界的权力，那位大人更强大的力量来自珠星——这座企业所编织的故事和梦想，能左右二相乐园的未来，也将成为全新幻造种诞生的苗床。
t_en: Indeed. Rather than the power to rule this world directly, that individual draws even greater strength from Pearluxe. The stories and dreams spun by this enterprise are capable of steering the future of Planarcadia, and of serving as the cradle for new imagenae.

t_ch: 在这座大楼的顶部，真珠女士正在等待着你，磋商幻月游戏的事宜。
t_en: Madam Pearl is waiting for you at the top of this building to discuss matters regarding the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 我想给你一些小小的提醒：幻月游戏的规则从未要求谒者间必须竞争。
t_en: Let me give you a little reminder: The rules of Phantasmoon Games have never required any competition between Supplicants.

t_ch: 你到底想说什么？
t_en: What are you trying to say?

t_ch: 你…知道的不少啊。
t_en: Hmm... you seem to be well-versed in this.

t_ch: 啊，作为这家公司的雇员，我说得实在太多了。你的小伙伴正在大厅等你，快去和他们集合吧，别让他们等太久了。
t_en: As an IPC employee, I've said far too much. Your friends are waiting for you in the hall. You should go meet up with them. Don't keep them waiting too long.

t_ch: 我和杨叔在屏幕上观看了全过程哦——
t_en: Mr. Yang and I watched the whole thing on the screen!

t_ch: 不止拼装了机铠，给自己的迷弟签了名，还过了一把超级英雄的瘾…{NICKNAME}，玩得开心吗？
t_en: Not only did you assemble the mechatron and give autographs to your fan, but you also got to live out your superhero fantasy... did you have fun, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 哈哈，杨叔看你的眼神也慈爱了起来，像是在看游乐园木马上的孩子一样。
t_en: Haha, Mr. Yang's looking at you with such loving eyes, like a parent watching a kid riding on a carousel at an amusement park.

t_ch: 确实，看着{NICKNAME}快乐的样子，我就想到了年轻时的自己，真令人怀念啊。
t_en: Indeed, seeing {NICKNAME} so happy reminds me of my younger self. Those were the days...

t_ch: 说什么呢，杨叔现在依然年轻！欸对了，咱们在这儿转悠了老半天，该看的也都看完了，这真珠女士到底打的是什么算盘？
t_en: What are you talking about? Mr. Yang, you're still young as ever! Oh right, we've been wandering around here for ages and seen everything there is to see. What's this Madam Pearl really up to?

t_ch: 她想向我们展示的一切我看明白了，只是，还有些问题我想和虚照小姐确认一下。
t_en: I understand everything she wanted to show us. There are just a few questions I'd like to confirm with Miss Nihilux.

t_ch: …虚照小姐？等等，她人呢？
t_en: ...Miss Nihilux? Wait, where did she go?

t_ch: 啊，你们几位在这儿啊，我们俩可是到处找了个遍。秘书办公室派了这位菲尔德专员来陪同诸位打发等候的时光，但他却说没能接到几位……
t_en: Ah, there you all are! We've been looking everywhere for you. The secretary's office sent agent Feld here to keep you company while you wait, but he said he couldn't find any of you...

t_ch: 啥？这位是派来的专员？
t_en: What? This guy's the assigned agent?

t_ch: 那刚才的虚照小姐又是谁？
t_en: Then who was that Miss Nihilux from earlier?

t_ch: 我就觉得…那女人很可疑。
t_en: Just as I thought... that woman seems pretty suspicious.

t_ch: 等等，如果这位菲尔德先生是派来迎接我们的人，那虚照小姐又是谁？
t_en: Wait, if Mr. Feld is the one who's supposed to meet us, then who is Miss Nihilux?

t_ch: 虚照…小姐？…谁？
t_en: Miss Nihilux...? ...Who?

t_ch: …IPC的职级P<unbreak>30</unbreak>，珠星财团的幻造技术研发部专员，虚照。
t_en: ...agent Nihilux, an IPC ranking P<unbreak>30</unbreak>, who works at Pearluxe Corp's Imagenesis Technology Department.

t_ch: P<unbreak>30</unbreak>？幻造技术研发部？珠星哪来什么幻造技术研发部呢……
t_en: P<unbreak>30</unbreak>? Imagenesis Technology Department? Since when did Pearluxe Corp have an Imagenesis Technology Department...

t_ch: 该不会是什么商业间谍混进了这栋楼里？
t_en: Could she be some kind of corporate spy who snuck into the building?

t_ch: 这下可真麻烦了，安保人员都是干什么吃的！几位，有没有受伤？又或者受骗交给她财物之类的东西？
t_en: This is a real mess. What are those security guards even doing!? Distinguished guests, are you hurt? Or did she trick you into giving her money or anything like that?

t_ch: 不，完全没有。
t_en: No, not at all.

t_ch: 居然骗我，伤心了。
t_en: I can't believe she lied to me. I'm hurt.

t_ch: 啊，给了她一张签名照。
t_en: Ah, I gave her an autographed photo.

t_ch: 果然，我早觉得她不对劲了…
t_en: Just as I thought, I knew something was off about her...

t_ch: 你怎么不早说？
t_en: Why didn't you say so earlier?

t_ch: 这位姐姐看起来毫无破绽，很熟练地带我们在这儿转悠了一圈，我还以为她是你们派来的人呢。
t_en: This lady seemed totally legit. She smoothly guided us around the place like a pro. I thought she was one of your people!

t_ch: 我得赶快把这事上报给安保部门，趁着那家伙没走多远，抓她个现行。
t_en: I need to report this to security right away. She can't have gone far, let's catch her in the act.

t_ch: 那就拜托了。星穹列车的诸位，真珠女士已等候多时，方便的话不妨现在出发，我来为各位引路。
t_en: Thank you for your help. Astral Express crew, Madam Pearl has been waiting for quite some time. If it's convenient, shall we head out now? I'll show you the way.

t_ch: 星穹列车的诸位，你们好，又见面了。
t_en: Hello, guests from the Astral Express, nice to see you again.

t_ch: 感谢您的盛情款待，真珠女士。
t_en: Thank you for your gracious hospitality, Madam Pearl.

t_ch: 听闻在底楼大厅里发生了一桩小小的骗局，有人冒充珠星的员工接近各位。希望她没有打搅到你们的兴致。
t_en: I understand there was a minor incident in the lower lobby, involving someone impersonating a Pearluxe employee. I hope it didn't spoil your enjoyment.

t_ch: 我们没事啦。倒是您这边，没弄丢什么贵重技术和设计图之类的机密信息吧？
t_en: We're fine, don't worry about us. But how are things with you? Did you lose any valuable tech, blueprints, or top secret information?

t_ch: 不，珠星的数据防火墙无人染指，安保网络所监控的各项财产也安然无恙，只是我的工号名下增添了一笔报销账目。
t_en: No, Pearluxe's data firewall remains untouched, and all assets under security network surveillance are intact. The only change is an additional expense claim under my employee ID.

t_ch: …罢了，可以初步判断：这是某人一时兴起的所为。
t_en: ...Never mind, I can make a preliminary assessment that this was the result of someone's momentary impulse.

t_ch: 最近的意外多如豪雨前的浓云，将不可知的阴霾投在我的决策蓝图上。
t_en: Lately, mishaps have been piling up like dark clouds before a downpour, casting shadows of uncertainty over my plans.

t_ch: 您是说…「告死魔」？
t_en: Could you be referring to... the Herald of Death?

t_ch: 鸽川区有三十三位公民横死，一位前往负责洽谈收购「欢愉假面」的公司专员意外殉职。对方不仅明目张胆地威胁治安，同时也在向公司发起挑衅。我有预感：这不过是个开始。
t_en: Thirty-three citizens were found dead in the Dovebrook District. In addition, an IPC Specialist assigned to negotiate the purchase of a "Mask of Elation" died in an unexpected incident. This party has made overt threats to public order and is clearly challenging the IPC. My intuition tells me this is only the beginning.

t_ch: 管理企业和经营资本有一个共通点：厌恶风险，追求稳定。而我，身兼二者之任。
t_en: Managing capital and managing a corporation share one thing in common, that is, an aversion to risk and a pursuit of stability. And I bear both responsibilities.

t_ch: 作为二相乐园的执行官，我对这个世界的安全负有不可推脱的义务。
t_en: As the executive officer of Planarcadia, I bear an inescapable responsibility for the safety of this world.

t_ch: 作为石心十人，我希望迅速、安全地结束「幻月游戏」。
t_en: As one of the Ten Stonehearts, I hope to bring the Phantasmoon Games to a swift and safe conclusion.

t_ch: 比起再一次上演绘世学院里那场危险的战斗，<color=#dbc291ff>我更希望这一次的幻月游戏中，谒者们能向这个世界的居民展示喜乐而非哀怒的「奇迹」。</color>
t_en: Rather than staging another dangerous battle like what happened at Graphia Academy, <color=#dbc291ff>I hope the Supplicants can show the people of this world miracles of joy and happiness instead of sorrow and rage during the Phantasmoon Games.</color>

t_ch: 因此，我想听听列车的诉求。{NICKNAME}，请告诉我……
t_en: Therefore, I'd like to hear the Express's request. {NICKNAME}, please tell me...

t_ch: 你加入幻月游戏的最终目标是什么？
t_en: What's your ultimate goal for joining the Phantasmoon Games?

t_ch: 在出发前，你曾向姬子谈起幻月游戏的目标……
t_en: Before setting off, you spoke to Himeko about your goals for the Phantasmoon Games...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你刚才说，想和我聊聊幻月游戏的事情？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you mentioned earlier that you wanted to talk about the Phantasmoon Games with me?

t_ch: 关于幻月游戏的目标。
t_en: About the goal of Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 关于我们最终的诉求。
t_en: About our final request.

t_ch: 嗯，想谈谈参与幻月游戏的最终目的。
t_en: Hmm, I'd like to talk about our ultimate goal for participating in the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 你有想法了？
t_en: Got something in mind?

t_ch: 我觉得「幻月游戏」的规则和奖赏，有些太模糊了。
t_en: I think the rules and rewards for the Phantasmoon Games are a little too vague.

t_ch: 嗯。十五年前，我加入游戏时也是这么想的。这场游戏允许谒者做任何事，不论善恶，这也就意味着游戏推进过程中的一切都处于失控。
t_en: Hmm. That's exactly what I thought when I joined the games fifteen years ago. These games allow Supplicants to do anything, good or evil... As a result, everything that unfolds in the course of these games exists beyond control.

t_ch: 更模糊的是，胜利者分享「欢愉」权能时又能做成些什么？从哈托彼亚古来的传说与历史记录来看，胜者通常会先见到阿哈本尊示现。
t_en: What's more vague, is what can winners do when they share the power of "the Elation"? According to legends and historical records from Ahatopia, victors typically first witness the manifestation of Aha THEMSELVES.

t_ch: 祂会倾听胜出者的愿望，然后许可对方使用自己的权能。而这份力量的应用场景又似乎宽泛到漫无边际。当人的面前有无数选择时，情况比没有选择还要棘手。
t_en: THEY listen to the victor's wishes and grant them permission to use THEIR power. And the applications of this power seem to be boundlessly vast. When faced with countless choices, the situation becomes even more thorny than having no choice at all.

t_ch: 有时我在想，如果我们当时答应了翡翠成为「反毁灭同盟」的领袖，这趟旅行又会怎样……
t_en: Sometimes I wonder, if we had agreed to become the leader of the Anti-Destruction Alliance, how would this trip have turned out...

t_ch: 我想让阿哈当领袖。
t_en: I want Aha to be the leader.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>如果胜利，我会放弃分享阿哈的权能，要求祂来当「反毁灭同盟」的领袖。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If I win, I'll give up sharing Aha's power and ask THEM to be the leader of the Anti-Destruction Alliance.</color>

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，这个想法真的很有趣，充满了画面感。
t_en: HAHAHA, that's such a hilarious idea. I can totally picture it!

t_ch: 我可是很认真的。
t_en: I'm being dead serious.

t_ch: 我并没有开玩笑。
t_en: I'm not joking around.

t_ch: 嗯，我明白。这个点子实在很妙。
t_en: Hmm, I get it. That's actually a brilliant idea.

t_ch: 首先，这比接过神明的权柄，在一分钟内尽情挥霍有价值得多了。
t_en: To begin with, this is far more meaningful than taking up a god's authority and squandering it freely for a single minute.

t_ch: 其次，把一位星神放在对抗宇宙头号威胁的大义名分上，无论公司还是那位神明本尊恐怕都挑不出毛病。
t_en: Secondly, placing an Aeon on the righteous cause of opposing the universe's greatest threat is something neither the IPC nor the god itself could reasonably object to.

t_ch: 最后，这也可以避免我们目前所面临的风险：与公司合作，却要提防在「反毁灭同盟」运作的过程中卷入公司的野心。
t_en: Finally, this would also help us avoid the risk we currently face: cooperating with the IPC while remaining wary of being drawn into its ambitions during the operation of the "Anti-Destruction Alliance."

t_ch: 如果交涉得当，也许阿哈可以站在星穹列车的背后，就像我们和仙舟间的合作一样，互不干涉却能遥遥援助。
t_en: If we handle the negotiations well, perhaps Aha could stand behind the Astral Express, just like our cooperation with the Xianzhou, where we could maintain distance from one another while offering support from afar.

t_ch: 唯一的问题是：阿哈会同意吗？
t_en: The only question is: Will Aha agree?

t_ch: 别担心帕，以我对这家伙的了解，祂会同意的。
t_en: Don't worry about that. From what I know about THEM, THEY'll agree.

t_ch: 要是违背自己制定的游戏规则，又怎么能算得上游戏之神呢？何况，祂还欠着列车一笔债帕。
t_en: What kind of God of Games would THEY be if THEY broke THEIR own rules? Besides, THEY still owe the Express a debt.

t_ch: 这是？
t_en: Is this...?

t_ch: 这是祂与阿基维利一起旅行期间欠下的列车债务欠条，上面还有祂的签字画押呢！
t_en: This is THEIR IOU for the Express debt from when THEY were traveling with Akivili, complete with THEIR signature and seal!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，用这个要挟祂，那家伙会同意你的请求的帕！
t_en: Passenger {NICKNAME}, use this to blackmail THEM! That one will definitely give in to your demands!

t_ch: 应该帕！
t_en: Probably!

t_ch: 你是说，你想让阿哈担当起「反毁灭同盟」的领袖责任。
t_en: So you're saying you want Aha to take on the leadership of the Anti-Destruction Alliance.

t_ch: 理性推演：失败，无法计算其成功率。我差一点就被这个奇怪的方案卡住了思考进程。
t_en: Logical extrapolation: Failed. Success rate indeterminable. This peculiar proposal nearly brought my thought process to a halt.

t_ch: 这个诉求太过缺乏条理，虽然在非理性的背景下它似乎又潜藏着某种合理性——
t_en: This request is far too lacking in structure, yet within an irrational context it seems to conceal a certain kind of logic—

t_ch: ——如果宇宙是欢愉之主的游乐场，那么祂理应为这座即将被摧毁的游乐场做些什么。
t_en: ...If the universe is the Master of Elation's playground, then THEY should do something about this playground that's about to be destroyed.

t_ch: 不愧是开拓之人，思维如此…跳脱。受教了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: As expected of the Trailblazer, your thinking is so... out of the box. I've learned something today, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 不过我认为，你在这场游戏中的赢面并不高，因为……
t_en: However, I don't think you stand much of a chance in the games, because...

t_ch: 我已加入其中，成了谒者。
t_en: I've joined as a Supplicant.

t_ch: 所以，接下来是BOSS战？
t_en: So, is this gonna be a boss fight?

t_ch: 幻月游戏中并没有哪条规则要求谒者间必须诉诸战斗。你我之间并无敌对的必要。
t_en: Not a single rule in the Phantasmoon Games requires Supplicants to engage in combat, so there's no need for hostility between us.

t_ch: 智械也可以成为谒者？
t_en: Can Intellitrons also become a Supplicant?

t_ch: 这是一个古老的问题：「智械是否拥有灵魂？」
t_en: This is an age-old question: "Do Intellitrons possess a soul?"

t_ch: 面具回应了我，这意味着「欢愉」认可了思考机器亦有寻求欢愉的潜力。我也许是幻月游戏有史以来第一位智械谒者。
t_en: The mask responded to me, which means the Elation has acknowledged that Intellitrons also have the potential to seek pleasure. And I am perhaps the first Intellitron Supplicant in the history of the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 二相乐园的管理者…成了谒者？
t_en: Planarcadia's administrator is... a Supplicant?

t_ch: 同时她手中还握有珠星财团这样庞大的资产。
t_en: At the same time, she has at her disposal assets of staggering magnitude... Pearluxe Corp among them.

t_ch: 有钱又有权，这么说来，她的胜算岂不是比我们高出许多许多？
t_en: With money and power on her side, wouldn't her chances of success be way higher than ours?

t_ch: 正如我之前给姬子小姐的提议：我愿意与星穹列车合作，为安然推进幻月游戏而努力。
t_en: As I previously proposed to Miss Himeko: I'm willing to cooperate with the Astral Express to ensure the smooth progression of the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 但星穹列车并非您唯一的合作伙伴吧？
t_en: But the Astral Express isn't your only partner, is it?

t_ch: 我还另有两位盟友。但，诸位是我最看好的合作对象。星穹列车一旦加入，将最大程度确保这场星神游戏的安全和胜利。
t_en: I have two other allies. However, you all are my most promising ones. Once the Astral Express joins, it will maximize the safety and success of this Aeonic game.

t_ch: 而我，也会尽我所能满足合作者的愿望——在那有限的一分钟内。
t_en: And I will do everything in my power to fulfill my partners' wishes, within that limited minute.

t_ch: 和反毁灭同盟一样…
t_en: This is just like the Anti-Destruction Alliance...

t_ch: 这是来收编咱们的啊…
t_en: She's here to recruit us...

t_ch: 正如我们之前告诉您的，我们的策略是「成为风帆，共同进退」。星穹列车并非孑然独行的谒者，我们在游戏中也有自己的合作伙伴。
t_en: As we told you before, our strategy is to "become a sail, advance and retreat together." The Astral Express is not a lone Supplicant, since we have our own allies in the Games.

t_ch: 盟友：火花？确实，你们击败了她，夺走了面具。但以她一贯的决策风格来看，火花并非可靠的盟友。
t_en: An ally like Sparxie? It's true that you defeated her and took her mask. But given her typical decision-making style, Sparxie isn't exactly what you'd call a reliable ally.

t_ch: 除她之外，我还有一张面具。
t_en: Besides her mask, I also have another one.

t_ch: 除她之外，我另有一位盟友。
t_en: Besides her, I have another ally.

t_ch: 推论：共愿帮丢失的面具？我本以为它落入了仙舟人的手中。莫非，爻光把它交给了你们？
t_en: Hypothesis: The Synwish Syndicate's missing mask? I thought it fell into the Xianzhou's hands. Don't tell me... Yao Guang gave it to you guys?

t_ch: 没错，三张面具对三张面具，目前咱们可是平手。
t_en: That's right, three against three. We're tied at the moment.

t_ch: 未知变量加入，我会修正演算。但结论似乎并无改变，毕竟我作为这个世界管理者，拥有资源上的天然优势。
t_en: With this new variable in play, I'll have to adjust my extrapolations. But the conclusion seems unchanged. After all, as the administrator of this world, I have the natural advantage in resources.

t_ch: 这并非是优势。
t_en: That's not necessarily an advantage.

t_ch: 这是你最大的劣势。
t_en: That's your biggest weakness.

t_ch: 公司的高管、二相乐园的管理者、石心十人之一亲自加入了游戏，听起来确实唬人。不过仔细想想，这个身份难道不是真珠女士要克服的最大困难吗？
t_en: An IPC senior executive, Planarcadia's administrator, a member of the Ten Stonehearts, joining the games personally. It certainly has an intimidating ring to it. But when you think about it, isn't this identity precisely the greatest burden Madam Pearl has to overcome?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}说得不错，您的身份实在过于敏感了。您想掌控这场游戏，安全迅速地结束它，但二相乐园的居民们未必这么想。
t_en: {NICKNAME} is right, your identity is far too sensitive. You want to control these games and end it safely and quickly, but Planarcadia's citizens might not see it this way.

t_ch: 他们只看到了只手遮天的大公司、有权有势的公司高管操弄一切…您的每一个行动都会倍受质疑。
t_en: All they see is the all-powerful IPC and an influential executive pulling all the strings... Your every action will be scrutinized twice over.

t_ch: 人们不想看公司胜利。
t_en: People don't want to see the IPC win.

t_ch: 人们更想看英雄胜利。
t_en: People want to see heroes triumph.

t_ch: 敏锐的观察力，值得赞赏。
t_en: A sharp observation, I must say. Quite impressive.

t_ch: 但我不认为您自己会忽视这一点。真珠女士，您如此不惜一切，又是想从幻月游戏中得到什么？
t_en: But I do not believe you yourself would overlook this. Madam Pearl, what is it that you seek to obtain from the Phantasmoon Games, at any cost?

t_ch: 我想要的是一样失落在这个世界历史中的宝物……
t_en: What I seek is a treasure lost to this world's history...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我想再现绘世的「幻造」神技。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I want to recreate Graphia's divine art of "Imagenesis."</color>

t_ch: …和绘画有关？
t_en: ...Does that have something to do with painting?

t_ch: 听起来难以置信，是吗？我的诞生，源于螺丝星的星体差分机所分配的母题：「艺术」。
t_en: Hard to believe, no? My birth originated from the theme assigned by the Celestial Differentiator of Planet Screwllum: "art."

t_ch: 最初的我，只是一台仿造人类画作的机器。对于智械来说，生成艺术品并非难事。
t_en: At first, I was nothing more than a machine that imitated human paintings. For an Intellitron, generating works of art is no great challenge.

t_ch: 我日复一日学习、日复一日穷举。我可以瞬间解析一切画作的比例结构与颜料成分，我可以精准复刻绘世画作的每一个像素，但我无法像她一样创造。
t_en: Day after day, I studied. Day after day, I exhausted every possibility. I could instantly analyze the proportional structure and pigment composition of any painting. I could precisely reproduce every pixel of Graphia's masterpieces, yet I could not create as she did.

t_ch: 绘世的至高创造，是在幻月游戏的尾声开辟了「画中世界」。我想洞察那一刻她的所思所想，触碰创造的真髓。
t_en: Graphia's ultimate creation was establishing the "World in Canvas" at the end of the Phantasmoon Games. I want to understand her thoughts at that moment, and touch the essence of creation.

t_ch: 这是您个人的追求，还是公司对这个世界的诉求？
t_en: Is this your personal pursuit, or the IPC's demands on this world?

t_ch: 二者皆有。公司的视角更为功利：「画中世界」是一个足以躲开反物质军团战火的维度，他们也一直渴望掌握这项技术。
t_en: Both. The IPC's point of view is far more pragmatic: The "World in Canvas" is a dimension that can shield us from the Antimatter Legion's warfare, and they've always been eager to master this technology.

t_ch: 很遗憾，看来我们暂时无法说服彼此退让。
t_en: Unfortunately, it seems we can't convince each other to back out for now.

t_ch: 那么，我有另一个提议：不妨改变一下视角，将目光投向尚未浮出水面的那两位谒者。
t_en: Then, I have another proposal: Why don't we shift our perspective and turn our attention to those two Supplicants who haven't surfaced yet?

t_ch: 这两人目标不明、能力成谜，若放任不管，极有可能会重演当年告死魔的悲剧。我有一个合作方案，有助于判明他们的情报。同时，我也愿意和各位分享这份情报。
t_en: These two individuals' objectives are unclear, and their abilities remain a mystery. If left unchecked, we might see a repeat of the Herald of Death tragedy. I have a cooperation proposal that could help us gather intelligence on them. And I'm willing to share this piece of information with you all.

t_ch: 不免费，对吧？
t_en: I'm guessing that doesn't come for free, right?

t_ch: 不错。但各位需要付出的，也不过是一点名气罢了。
t_en: That is correct. But all you need to do is sacrifice a tiny sliver of your reputation.

t_ch: 那么，代价是什么呢？
t_en: Ok, but at what cost?

t_ch: 一点小小的名气罢了。
t_en: A tiny sliver of your reputation.

t_ch: 在谈合作细节前，诸位是想歇一歇，喝口茶润润嗓子？还是接着谈下去？
t_en: Before we move on to the details of our cooperation, would you like to take a short break and have some tea to wet your whistles, or shall we continue?

t_ch: 接着谈下去。
t_en: Let's continue the discussion.

t_ch: 喝口茶润润嗓子。
t_en: Having some tea wouldn't be a bad idea.

t_ch: 这是……！
t_en: What the...!

t_ch: 太失礼了。
t_en: Hey, that's rude!

t_ch: 喷我一脸，啊，这味道是…
t_en: Sprayed me right in my face, ah, this smell... Is that...

t_ch: 怎么了嘛？
t_en: Is something wrong?

t_ch: 这是爻光将军赠我的仙舟特产，是名为「苏打豆汁」的珍物。
t_en: This is a specialty from the Xianzhou, a precious item called "mung bean soda" that General Yao Guang gifted me.

t_ch: 作为智械，我无福消受人类的饮品，因此特意留给贵客们享用。
t_en: As an Intellitron, I can't enjoy human beverages, so I've specially saved this for my esteemed guests.

t_ch: 我们和这种饮料还真有缘分啊。
t_en: Seems we really do have a special connection with these drinks.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我想以珠星作为主办方，为星穹列车举行一场博览会…至于名字，就叫：「星铁FES」如何？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I was thinking of having Pearluxe Corp host an expo for the Astral Express... As for the name, how about: "Star Rail FEST"?</color>

t_ch: 「星铁FES」？您是说…举办一场《苍天航路绒绒号》的漫展？
t_en: "Star Rail FEST"? You mean hosting... a Fluffy Across the Blue convention?

t_ch: 正确，但不完全正确。绒绒号在这个世界广为人知，它是个不错的联动要素。
t_en: Correct, but not entirely. The Fluffy is well-known in this world, so it's a good collaboration element.

t_ch: 但我想要的是：一场规模空前的星穹列车展，绒绒号只是其中的点缀。这场盛会的主角是你们：列车组的乘员们。你们会亲临现场，与这个世界的人们见面。
t_en: But what I want is an unprecedented Astral Express exhibition, with The Fluffy being just a small part of it. The real stars of this grand event will be you, the Express Crew. You'll be there in person to meet the people of this world.

t_ch: 您想用这场展会引诱那两位身份不明的谒者现身？
t_en: Are you trying to use this exhibition to lure those two unidentified Supplicants out of hiding?

t_ch: 啊？万一他们都不怀好意，那我们不就成了吸引火力的目标吗？
t_en: Huh? What if they're up to no good? Won't that just make us walking targets?

t_ch: 这对我们有什么好处？
t_en: What's in it for us?

t_ch: 还有什么能比与银河里的英雄面对面更能鼓舞一个世界的居民？
t_en: What could be more inspiring to the people of a world than standing face to face with heroes of the cosmos?

t_ch: 这可是一股巨大的愿力。星穹列车就是促成这股愿力诞生的源泉。
t_en: That's an enormous amount of Wishpower. And the Astral Express is the very source from which this Wishpower originates.

t_ch: 你愿意拱手将优势让给我们？
t_en: You're willing to hand over the advantage to us?

t_ch: 后来居上的方案还有很多。比起进展，我更在意计划面临什么样的未知风险。
t_en: There are many ways to take the lead afterward. I'm less concerned about the progress than about the unknown risks our plan might face.

t_ch: 我们双方可以共同为所有人展示这样一个「奇迹」：一座描绘英雄传奇的游乐园。
t_en: Together, we can create a "miracle" for all to witness: an arcadia devoted to the legends of heroes.

t_ch: 我也会请来满愿电视台之类的主流媒体进行合作宣传。毫无疑问，作为回报，愿力将流向你们。
t_en: I'll also get Fulwish TV and other mainstream media outlets involved for promotional cooperation. And in return, Wishpower will flow to you, of this I have no doubt.

t_ch: 成交。
t_en: Deal.

t_ch: 明智的选择。
t_en: A wise choice.

t_ch: 在「星铁FES」正式开启前，我还想拜托各位一件事：<color=#dbc291ff>我想请列车组登门拜访，见一见《苍天航路绒绒号》的原作者，模糊二维马。</color>
t_en: Before the "Star Rail FEST" officially begins, I have one more favor to ask of you all: I'd like the Express Crew to pay a visit to Blurry_QR_Colt, the original author of Fluffy Across the Blue.

t_ch: 珠星不是拥有绒绒号的版权吗？
t_en: Doesn't Pearluxe own the rights to The Fluffy?

t_ch: 自出道以来这位作者一直隐姓埋名，真容从不显露人前。但如果故事里的真人原型能到府上拜访，想必给足了他面子，也能说服他到场签售，再添一把火。
t_en: Since their debut, this author has remained anonymous, never revealing their true identity in public. But if the real-life inspiration behind the story were to pay them a personal visit, it would surely be a great honor, and likely persuade them to attend a signing, stoking the excitement even further.

t_ch: 就包在我们身上了。
t_en: Leave it to us.

t_ch: 既然商议已定，就拜托诸位了。我会差遣秘书及时与各位互通有无。
t_en: Now that we've reached an agreement, I'll leave it in your capable hands. My secretary will be in touch to keep all parties apprised.

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，在离开前，还请收下这件小小的礼物，作为你我第一次合作成立的纪念吧。
t_en: By the way, {NICKNAME}, before you leave, please accept this small gift as a memento of our first collaboration.

t_ch: 这是…砂金的筹码？
t_en: Is this... Aventurine's chip?

t_ch: 这是什么意思？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean?

t_ch: 我详细观摩了同僚们在匹诺康尼与合作伙伴往来的记录。其中砂金先生习惯赠送代表好运的小礼物这个技巧让我颇受启发。
t_en: I've studied in detail the records of my colleagues' interactions with partners in Penacony, and I was particularly inspired by Aventurine's technique of giving small gifts that symbolize good fortune.

t_ch: 因此，请把这枚筹码当成是你我合作好运开始的象征带在身上。诸位，一路走好。
t_en: So, please keep this chip with you as a symbol of good fortune for our future cooperation. Take care, everyone.

t_ch: 那我们就告辞了。
t_en: Well, we'll be on our way then.

t_ch: 这样的场面，你会觉得紧张吗？放轻松，以后会慢慢习惯的。
t_en: Do you feel nervous in a situation like this? Relax, you'll get used to it soon.

t_ch: 好怪的笔名。
t_en: Such a weird pen name.

t_ch: 为啥？
t_en: Why's that?

t_ch: 作为你的私家侦探，我有义务提醒你，一场盛况空前的展会，将会成为重演「血涂游戏」的绝佳时机。
t_en: As your private detective, I must warn you that a grand exhibition of unprecedented scale would make for a perfect opportunity to reenact the "Bloodstained Games."

t_ch: 我明白。所以，我要交给你一个任务：在「星铁FES」上保护这些无名客。
t_en: I understand. That's why I have a mission for you: Protect the Nameless at "Star Rail FEST."

t_ch: 以他们的实力，需要我来保护？难不成在你的推演里，会有更大的麻烦到来？
t_en: You actually think they would need my protection with their strength? Don't tell me your extrapolations predict even bigger trouble ahead?

t_ch: 潜藏在一次次推演之下，总有些小小的不安信号上浮到我的思考界面中。我必须为此做好万全的准备。
t_en: Hidden beneath each extrapolation, tiny signals of unease keep bubbling up to my thought interface. I must be thoroughly prepared for whatever may come.

t_ch: 既然你接下了面具，也该谈谈报酬了。你想要什么？老样子，钱？
t_en: Now that you've taken up the mask, let's talk about payment. What do you want? The same as always, money?

t_ch: 谈报酬前，先谈谈「告死魔」吧。虽然「异常防御部」封存、销毁了关于血涂游戏的资料。但我还是查到了一些不寻常的蛛丝马迹……
t_en: Before we talk about payment, let's discuss the Herald of Death. Although the Department of Aberration Defense sealed and destroyed all records of the Bloodstained Games, I still managed to uncover some unusual leads...

t_ch: 告死魔事件结束后，受害者家属集体得到了一笔数字大到足以填满任何巨大创伤的赔偿金。所以我想，也许可以从二相乐园的官方支出里找找门道。
t_en: After the Herald of Death incident, the victims' families collectively received compensation so massive it could fill any gaping wound. So I figured, maybe we could find some leads by looking into official Planarcadia expenditures.

t_ch: 有趣的是，当年公示的财报中却遍寻不着这个条目。你猜猜，这笔钱到底走了谁的帐？
t_en: Here's the interesting part: This item was nowhere to be found in that year's public financial report. Care to guess whose books this money went through?

t_ch: 是星际和平公司的「技术研发部」支付了这笔堪称天文数字的赔款。
t_en: It was you, the omnipresent IPC. To be precise, it was the IPC's Technology Department that paid this astronomical compensation.

t_ch: 为什么一颗小小边星上的死亡事件要让IPC科学家们的经费大出血？难道他们除了搞科研外，还心系慈善不成？
t_en: Why would a lethal incident on some minor frontier planet cause IPC scientists to hemorrhage funding? Don't tell me they're moonlighting as philanthropists on top of their research work?

t_ch: 按照人类戏剧的套路，这时候我是不是该来点掌声？能查到这些信息，足见名侦探不死途的人脉与实力。
t_en: Following the usual human drama tropes, am I supposed to give you a round of applause now? Being able to dig up all this information really shows your connections and capabilities, Detective Ashveil.

t_ch: 电影里你这样的大人物通常会把手抬起来，露出黑洞洞的枪口。
t_en: In movies, a big shot like you would usually raise a hand right about now, revealing the dark muzzle of a gun.

t_ch: 「对不起，你知道的太多了。」砰！枪响，然后我这个翻出真相的倒霉蛋就该一命呜呼了。
t_en: "I'm afraid you've learned too much." And BANG! That's when the gun goes off, and I, the poor sap who uncovered the truth, am supposed to bite the dust.

t_ch: 抱歉，我的手正放在支票簿上，抽不开空。不死途先生，告诉我：这次合作的报酬数字，你想填几个零？
t_en: Sorry, my hand is on the checkbook and unavailable. Mr. Ashveil, tell me: How many zeros would you like to see on that check for our cooperation?

t_ch: …这不是钱的问题。
t_en: ...It's not about the money.

t_ch: 确实，钱不是问题。一亿信用点？
t_en: Indeed, money isn't the issue. A hundred million credits?

t_ch: 你把我当受害者家属收买？告诉我，为什么是「技术研发部」付钱抹平了这事？
t_en: Are you trying to buy me off like some poor victim's family? Tell me, why did the Technology Department pay to sweep this under the rug?

t_ch: 三个亿。我知道，你一直很需要钱：冷冻睡眠，赡养那些殉难兄弟的遗属，还要治疗那些活着的人——让钱落入需要它的人手中，这不正是战略投资的意义所在？
t_en: Three hundred million. I know you've always needed money: For cryosleep, supporting the families of fallen comrades, and for treating those who survived. Isn't this exactly what strategic investment is about? Putting money in the hands of those who need it?

t_ch: 我不是你的打手，智械！告诉我答案！
t_en: I'm not your lackey, Intellitron! Tell me the answer!

t_ch: 五个亿，我可以装作计数进程出错，给你填上十个亿。金钱或答案，二择一，你来选。
t_en: <unbreak>500</unbreak> million. I could pretend there's a glitch in my calculation process and make it a cool billion for you. Money or answer, your call.

t_ch: …我要答案。
t_en: ...I want the answer.

t_ch: …出人意料的选择。颠覆了我对你决策树的一贯认知——备注：这句话绝不含有嘲讽的语义。
t_en: ...An unexpected choice. It defies my usual understanding of your decision tree. Note: I say this without sarcasm or ridicule.

t_ch: 答案是：我知道的不多。也许你很难相信，作为首席执行官，我的权力并不是无限的。何况……
t_en: The answer is: I don't know much. Hard to believe, perhaps, but as CEO, my power isn't unlimited. Besides...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>告死魔已是十五年前的往事了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Herald of Death affair lies fifteen years in the past.</color>

t_ch: 这个世界就像是多年未了的一局残棋，前任棋士埋下的暗手总是不断成为我今日的挑战。
t_en: This world is like an unfinished game of chess that's been dragging on for years. The hidden moves laid by the previous player keep becoming my challenges, even today.

t_ch: 但既然你邀请我一起下完这局棋，那么共享情报是必须的。
t_en: But since you've invited me to finish this game together, sharing intel is a must.

t_ch: 合理，我会分享我所知的「答案」。
t_en: Reasonable. I'll share what I know about the answer.

t_ch: 「告死魔」马库斯•安塔利，博识学会「完美进化学派」最后一位成员。五年前，他已被验明正身，执行死刑了——备注：各种意义上的「死刑」。
t_en: Marcus Antali, the Herald of Death, last member of the Intelligentsia Guild's "School of Evolutionary Perfection." Five years ago, his identity was confirmed, and he was executed. Note: Executed in every sense of the word.

t_ch: 「技术研发部」的负责人亚婆离女士接手了他的遗物，相关的记录连我也无权阅读。
t_en: Ms. Yabuli, head of the Technology Department, took possession of his belongings, and even I don't have the clearance to access those records.

t_ch: 难怪，四舍五入，这家伙可以算得上公司的人。这也解释了「技术研发部」付钱的理由。但最近的这场凶案，手法和当年如出一辙，如果告死魔本尊已经死了……
t_en: No wonder. So that guy was practically IPC personnel, give or take. That also explains why the Technology Department shelled out the compensation. Yet the method behind this latest killing is identical to the one from years ago, if the Herald of Death is truly dead...

t_ch: 「一个连环杀手死而复生」，这是所有可能性中最不需要我们担忧的。连环杀手即便死而复生，也不过是一个被星神游戏排除在外的连环杀手。
t_en: A serial killer coming back from the dead is the least of our worries. Even if a serial killer does come back to life, he's still just a serial killer who's been shut out of the Aeonic game.

t_ch: 更值得警惕的是：有人想要利用「告死魔」的遗产。亚婆离女士带走了那家伙留下的一切，唯独没有带走这个世界居民对他的恐惧。
t_en: What's more concerning is this: Someone wants to exploit the legacy of the Herald of Death. Ms. Yabuli took away everything that man left behind, except for the fear he instilled in the people of this world.

t_ch: 而在幻月游戏中，不仅奇迹可以激起愿力，恐惧也可以。按照我的推演，「新告死魔」的登场也许会成为游戏失控的开始。
t_en: And during the Phantasmoon Games, not only can miracles trigger Wishpower, but fear too. Based on my extrapolations, the appearance of this new Herald of Death might mark the beginning of the festival spiraling out of control.

t_ch: 难怪你如此急着结束它。
t_en: No wonder you're in such a hurry to end the Games.

t_ch: 不死途先生，我向来敬重你，但眼下，我更需要借助你的实力。
t_en: Mr. Ashveil, I've always respected you, but right now, I need to rely on your strength even more.

t_ch: 敬重…年轻时的我更想得到的是「公司的畏惧」，时间还真是无情啊。
t_en: "Respect"... When I was younger, what I really wanted was to make the IPC fear me. The passage of time's not exactly kind, is it?

t_ch: 成交，真珠女士。但我还要索取另一样报酬——
t_en: Deal, Madam Pearl. But I will require one more form of compensation—

t_ch: 无论这个「新告死魔」是谁，必须由我亲手制裁。这一次，不会再有漫长的审讯。
t_en: Whoever this new Herald of Death is, I must deliver justice with my own hands. This time, there won't be any lengthy interrogation.

t_ch: 以二相乐园首席执行官的权力，我赦免因你复仇而生的一切罪名。
t_en: By the authority vested in me as CEO of Planarcadia, I pardon all crimes committed in the course of your revenge.

t_ch: 放手去做吧，不死途先生。
t_en: Go ahead and do what you must, Mr. Ashveil.

t_ch: 小三月的逛逛之魂又觉醒了，我们不要走太远喔。
t_en: Looks like March's inner explorer has been awakened again. Let's not wander too far this time, shall we?

t_ch: 杨叔！来这边，快过来啊！
t_en: Mr. Yang! Over here, quick, come on!

t_ch: 哈哈，站在这么大的机铠下方，很有感觉！
t_en: Haha, standing below a huge mechatron like this is just incredible!

t_ch: 杨叔果然还是个热血少年啊~
t_en: Looks like Mr. Yang's still young at heart after all~

t_ch: 咱们先去商品区走走，我来给各位送上一份纪念品。
t_en: Why don't we head to the gift shop first? I'll get you all some souvenirs.

t_ch: 礼物送出，接下来我带大家去参观机铠设计室。
t_en: Now that the gifts are done, I'll take you to the mechatron design lab.

t_ch: 这是我最期待的环节了。
t_en: This is the part I've been looking forward to the most.

t_ch: 那就跟我走吧，各位！
t_en: So follow me, everyone!

t_ch: 拼装的第一步，就是将连接在板件上的零件一个个取下来。
t_en: The first step of assembly is to remove each part from the frame one by one.

t_ch: 模型剪钳、笔刀、砂纸、打磨棒…本公司概不提供。
t_en: Nippers, hobby knife, sandpaper, sanding stick... Pearluxe doesn't provide any of these.

t_ch: 但是别担心！起爆装置会解决你的一切困扰，勇敢踩上去吧！
t_en: But don't worry! The explosive device will solve all your problems, just step on it bravely!

t_ch: 尽管看上去非常粗暴，但它一个水口都没留，这正是我们引以为傲的珠星魔法！
t_en: It may look brutal, but it leaves no burrs. And that's the magic that we at Pearluxe Corp are so proud of!

t_ch: 接下来，请启动「维修用机械臂」，对准肩部接合基座，将手臂接入。
t_en: Next, please activate the mechanical maintenance arm and align it with the shoulder joint base to connect the arm.

t_ch: 很好，手臂的部分暂时完成了。
t_en: Good, we're done with the arm for now.

t_ch: 接下来请启动移动式整备架，将机铠调整至肩甲板件处。
t_en: Next, activate the mobile maintenance rack and adjust the mech armor to the shoulder armor panel position.

t_ch: 和刚才一样，第一步，先将零件从板件上拆下来。
t_en: Just like before, the first step is to remove the parts from the frame.

t_ch: 人造重力场方向调整中，请注意安全。
t_en: Artificial gravity field adjusting, please exercise caution.

t_ch: 请启动推进器，将肩甲推向单元接口处。
t_en: Activate the thruster and push the shoulder armor towards the unit interface.

t_ch: 太美丽了，巨型机铠。不愧是珠星之魂！
t_en: Beautiful, absolutely beautiful! This giant mechatron is truly the soul of Pearluxe Corp!

t_ch: 接下来就是最后的模块了，请为它安装好背部的破晓战刃。
t_en: Now for the final part. Please install the Daybreak Blade on its back.

t_ch: 对准背后的挂点，发射！
t_en: Aim at the mounting point on the back, and fire!

t_ch: 绽放吧！破晓战刃！
t_en: Awaken! Daybreak Blade!

t_ch: 看啊！那耀眼的色彩如同星间穿行的列车！
t_en: Look! Those dazzling colors are like an express train traversing through the stars!

t_ch: 覆盖全身的强化铠甲，是守护市民的坚固壁垒！
t_en: Enhanced full-body armor, a steadfast shield for the people!

t_ch: 咆哮吧！炽烈的灵魂！
t_en: Roar! Let your blazing soul ignite!

t_ch: 多么强力的一击！
t_en: What a powerful strike!

t_ch: 那就是我们的英雄，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: That's our hero, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这一击，承载着所有市民的希望！喝啊啊啊啊——！
t_en: This strike carries the hopes of all citizens! HYAAAAAAH!

t_ch: 什么？英雄竟然被违章建筑给挡住了！城市啊，你在做什么啊——！
t_en: What!? Our hero got blocked by an illegal building! City!? What are you doing!

t_ch: 没办法了！打碎它吧，英雄！
t_en: No choice left! Smash it to pieces, hero!

t_ch: 你只管解决城市的危机，赔偿的事就交给真珠女士来想办法吧！
t_en: Just focus on dealing with the city's crisis and let Madam Pearl worry about the compensation!
